modules.name: WORBI
modules.summary: Local-first worldbuilding workspace for lore, characters, locations, timelines, notes, and project planning.

overview.body: WORBI is a browser-based worldbuilding tool packaged as a Nymph module. It is designed for writers, game developers, solo creators, and teams who need a local project bible for fictional worlds and production notes.
works_with: Blender/Unity/Unreal projects as external reference material
requirements: Local WebView2 or browser access to the WORBI web app

modules.name: Z-Image Turbo
modules.summary: Local Z-Image Turbo image generation backend using the Nunchaku runtime.

modules.name: TRELLIS.2
modules.summary: Local TRELLIS.2 GGUF 3D generation backend with model fetch and smoke-test hooks.

modules.name: Brain
modules.summary: Local assistant, llama-server, Open WebUI, and MCP orchestration stack.

modules.name: LoRA
modules.summary: AI Toolkit powered Z-Image Turbo LoRA training sidecar for datasets, jobs, and generated adapters.
